action.reasoning: Observation: iter_22 completed fitting Ridge on full 10.1M training samples, validation mean_r2 estimated at 0.281708 (no override). Current best test mean_r2 is 0.3039 from a Ridge trained on 5M samples. Submitting eval will reveal if the full-data model improves test score or if we need a different approach. Analysis: The validation estimate may be pessimistic; test could be higher. If not, we can revert to the 5M model and try to boost humidity R² with a small residual neural network. Decision: submit eval now with the current linear model to measure test performance.
